product_highlights: DL Copper Ferment — unique bio-fermented active combining copper peptide benefits with fermentation-derived bioactives
Anti-aging, skin brightening, and barrier repair in a single ingredient
Enhanced bioavailability of active compounds through fermentation process
Novel bioactive compounds not available from conventional synthetic chemistry

notes: Deveraux Specialties is a specialty cosmetic ingredient supplier with a distinctive focus on bio-fermented actives. Their flagship DL Copper Ferment is a unique bio-fermented active ingredient that combines the proven benefits of copper peptides with the enhanced bioavailability of fermentation-derived bioactives, delivering multi-functional anti-aging, skin brightening, and barrier repair benefits in a single ingredient. Deveraux's fermentation platform enables the production of novel bioactive compounds with enhanced bioavailability and efficacy that are not achievable through conventional synthetic chemistry — a compelling proposition for premium and science-forward cosmetic brands.
